title: feat: add API key management endpoints (create, list, revoke)
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the hive
gist.blurb: You can now create, list, and revoke API keys programmatically. We've added secure endpoints so your apps can manage access without ever touching the dashboard.
gist.summary: Added new API endpoints to programmatically create, list, and revoke API keys, complete with strict security controls to prevent privilege escalation.
gist.impact: Developers can now automate API key management directly within their applications, using secure, permission-gated endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a keymaster or locksmith. Holding a glowing golden pixel-art key. A retro terminal showing 'POST /keys'. Nomnom creature eating an old revoked key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny locksmith apron, holding a glowing golden key. A chunky retro terminal in the background displays lime green (#ecf874) code for generating keys. The round nomnom creature happily eats a rusty, revoked key. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny locksmith apron, holding a glowing golden key.
